hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ -n "$cmd" ] && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^rtk |^rtk$'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"additionalContext\": \"REMINDER: Wrap this command with rtk. Example: rtk $cmd\"}}"; fi
